title: calcitrapoides praecox
intro: Calcitrapoides praecox, also known as prickly thistle or prickly calcitrap, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Calcitrapoides praecox include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
